title: A transformative universal model for all shoreline erosion dynamics
abstract: We present a transformative universal model for all shoreline erosion dynamics and show a small improvement on one regional simulation archive relative to the current baseline. The manuscript claims immediate policy relevance across all coasts.
manuscript_text: We test one model on one regional simulation archive. Figure 1 shows a modest improvement relative to the baseline, but Table 1 does not report uncertainty intervals, comparator stress tests, or failure conditions. The manuscript argues that the model should transform shoreline planning across all coasts.
figures_and_captions: Figure 1. Modest improvement relative to the baseline on one regional archive.
tables: Table 1. One summary metric for the regional simulation archive.
ethics_and_disclosures: The authors declare no competing interests.
